name: Session Bus
description: Cross-channel/session memory synchronization. Maintains a shared FIFO message queue so that conversations across different channels (WeChat, Discord, Telegram, etc.) can share context without polluting each session's focus.

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum number of messages kept in the shared queue (FIFO eviction). Default: 500.

storageDir.description: Directory for queue.jsonl and cursors.json. Default: ~/.openclaw/session-bus. If relative, resolved against ~/.openclaw/. Absolute paths used as-is. Allows customization with a strong default.
